title: PanelAutoMeshByGeneralDivide
description: PanelAutoMeshByGeneralDivide: Divide the panel based on points and lines in the meshing group and a maximum size.

MaxSizeGeneral.description: This is the maximum size of objects created by the General Divide Tool. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
